locale_selector.label: Demo locale
locale_selector.hint: Tap a locale to preview the marketing/admin copy.

sessions.title: Welcome
sessions.intro: The SourceGrid Labs backend dashboard lets admins manage bookings, payments, automations, and staff workflows in one place so you can demo the full operating system without custom builds.
sessions.unlock_copy: Type in the demo email and password to log into the admin console.
sessions.info: These credentials also work for API calls, Expo builds, and any other authenticated demo surfaces.

session_preview.title: Stored session
session_preview.hint: Tokens are stored on-device so you can reuse the marketing/admin session without logging in again.

errors.generic: Unable to sign in. Double-check the credentials and try again.
errors.link_open: Could not open the requested link.

flash.welcome_back: Welcome back! You're now viewing the admin dashboard.
flash.invalid_credentials: Those credentials didn't match. Use the seeded email and password shown.

custom_features.title: Custom modules
custom_features.subtitle: Design admin tooling tailored to your workflows.

entries.title: Executive Insights

console.title: SourceGrid Labs Demo Console

console.carousel_hint: Swipe or use the arrows to preview each surface.
